etymology.description: semantic 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") + phonetic 亢(亢) (kàng) -> navigation on water or through the air
etymology.interpretation: 舟(舟) (zhōu, "boat") provides the semantic element of water or maritime activity, suggesting movement or travel on a vessel. 亢(亢) (kàng) lends the phonetic aspect without contributing to the meaning directly, ensuring the pronunciation matches related terms in navigation or aviation contexts.

examples.chinese: 这艘船正在航行中(這艘船正在航行中)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè sōu chuán zhèngzài hángxíng zhōng.

examples.chinese: 我们参观了航空博物馆(我們參觀了航空博物館)。
他们正在研究新型航空技术(他們正在研究新型航空技術)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài yánjiū xīnxíng hángkōng jìshù.
examples.english: They are researching new aviation technologies.
